subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath heard and seen, and who hath answered the Lord of all men when the Call was raised betwixt the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن سمع و رای و اجاب مولی الوری اذ ارتفع الندآء بین الارض
